steps.title: Find the time clue
steps.content: The notes tell us Engelbart won the award in 1997. That date is the only specific time reference given.

steps.title: Match the timing emphasis
steps.content:
Choice D uses a cleft sentence to highlight the year 1997, directly reflecting the clue.
The other choices either omit the year, focus on the award's purpose or the invention, or give a generic statement.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
